overall.description: Static shot of a medieval great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and Gothic stone architecture from a video game. Two characters in dark academic robes walk through the hall toward the camera at different times while other figures sit at distant tables. The scene features cinematic lighting with natural light streaming through large windows at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with long dining tables and vaulted ceiling

events.description: character in dark academic robes enters from the far end of the hall and walks toward the camera
character passes close to the camera, temporarily blocking the view before exiting the frame
second character enters from the far end and walks toward the camera along the center aisle

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera through the center aisle, passing close by and exiting the frame

entered.detail: high arched wooden ceiling with exposed beams and Gothic architectural details
grey stone walls with mounted portraits and decorative tapestries
long wooden dining tables arranged in parallel rows with attached benches
large Gothic arched windows at the far end letting in bright natural light
large ornate stone fireplace on the left wall with decorative mantel

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls. Natural light streams through Gothic windows at the far end, illuminating long wooden dining tables arranged in rows. Characters in dark academic robes walk through the center aisle toward the camera at two different points in the clip, temporarily occluding the view as they pass close by, while other figures remain seated at distant tables throughout the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a grand medieval great hall where the stillness of the architecture is punctuated by the rhythmic movement of figures. It begins with a wide view of the vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls, as natural light streams through distant Gothic windows to illuminate rows of long dining tables. As the scene unfolds, characters in dark academic robes emerge from the depths of the hall and walk down the center aisle toward the lens. The view is temporarily occluded as these figures pass closely by the camera, while other students remain seated in the soft light of the background. The shot finally settles back into the quiet expanse of the hall, emphasizing the scale of the stone architecture and the steady glow of the far windows.
